feed.title: VeriClaw Canonical Route Feed
feed.subtitle: Canonical VeriClaw routes for correction-first discovery, proof checking, and install intent.

entry.title: VeriClaw Use Cases
entry.summary: Route hub for canonical VeriClaw symptom, workflow, and install surfaces.

entry.title: AI Work Hallucination
entry.summary: Exact-intent route for AI work hallucination, false completion reports, and proof-first correction.

entry.title: First Proof Check
entry.summary: Fastest proof-oriented starting point for testing VeriClaw on a concrete case.

entry.title: Proof Checking
entry.summary: Evidence-first route for verifying whether an AI action actually happened.

entry.title: Done-Gate Verification
entry.summary: Canonical route for premature closure, missing sign-off proof, and completion gating.

entry.title: ClawHub Skill
entry.summary: Primary public install-oriented route for VeriClaw on ClawHub.

entry.title: Download
entry.summary: Standalone app download route for macOS users evaluating VeriClaw.

entry.title: Support VeriClaw
entry.summary: Support route with live WeChat and Monzo paths plus links back into canonical product surfaces.
